'''fasatha''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:zamboorak|zamboorak]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''male''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| f-s-th
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:zamboorak|zamboorak]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| male
|-
! Citation form
| fasatha
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:fæsæthæth|fæsæthæth]] || [[word:fæsæthæj|fæsæthæj]] || [[word:fæsæthæsh|fæsæthæsh]] || [[word:fæsæthæ|fæsæthæ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:fasasathath|fasasathath]] || [[word:fasasathaj|fasasathaj]] || [[word:fasasathash|fasasathash]] || [[word:fasasatha|fasasatha]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:fasathath|fasathath]] || [[word:fasathaj|fasathaj]] || [[word:fasathash|fasathash]] || [[word:fasatha|fasatha]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:fasafthath|fasafthath]] || [[word:fasafthaj|fasafthaj]] || [[word:fasafthash|fasafthash]] || [[word:fasafthaf|fasafthaf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for male singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:fasathatha|fasathatha]] || [[word:fasathaja|fasathaja]] || [[word:fasathasha|fasathasha]] || [[word:fasathaka|fasathaka]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:fasathath|fasathath]] || [[word:fasathaj|fasathaj]] || [[word:fasathash|fasathash]] || [[word:fasatha|fasatha]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:fasathathal|fasathathal]] || [[word:fasathajal|fasathajal]] || [[word:fasathashal|fasathashal]] || [[word:fasathakal|fasathakal]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:fasathathatha|fasathathatha]] || [[word:fasathajaja|fasathajaja]] || [[word:fasathashasha|fasathashasha]] || [[word:fasathaka|fasathaka]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:fasathathan|fasathathan]] || [[word:fasathajan|fasathajan]] || [[word:fasathashan|fasathashan]] || [[word:fasathakan|fasathakan]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:fasathathaoro|fasathathaoro]] || [[word:fasathajaoro|fasathajaoro]] || [[word:fasathashaoro|fasathashaoro]] || [[word:fasathakaoro|fasathakaoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki male nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|59e8839}}
